pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which extracts exactly 20 frames, and verifier.py which checks output_file_count == 20.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which creates and populates this directory.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which creates this directory, and export_result.sh which reads from it.
Verified by writing a python script to stream and read the FITS file 'WASP-12b/WASP-12b_00061_bsdf.fits' directly from the URL found in install_astroimagej.sh using astropy.
Verified by reading verifier.py which awards maximum points when the measured residual shift is < 1.0 px.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 20 real FITS images (WASP-12b dataset from the University of Louisville), which have native dimensions of 4096x4096. However, a synthetic tracking drift (3px X, 2px Y per frame) is artificially injected by the setup script. The agent must align the images to achieve a residual shift of less than 1.0 px and fully crop out all zero-value padding at the edges, resulting in exactly 20 output frames in the aligned_sequence directory.
